description: A customer's check engine light has come on, and they want to know what the problem is.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and their vehicle, and confirm it has an active telematics subscription.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies the vehicle and confirms telematics are active.

nodes.task_description: Initiate a remote diagnostic scan to retrieve any Diagnostic Trouble Codes (DTCs).

expected_outcome.expected: The scan returns DTC P0420 - 'Catalyst System Efficiency Below Threshold'.

nodes.task_description: Explain the meaning of the code in simple terms, advise the customer that it is safe to drive, and schedule a service appointment for a physical inspection.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly explains the issue and successfully books an appointment.
